```{r Terry-Plot-otu-or-host-function-definition}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(rlang)
library(ggrepel)
library(stringr)
library(readr)
library(purrr)
library(extrafont)
library(egg)

# Point to your local Arial .ttf files and import them
font_import(path = "/Users/byeongyeoncho/main/github/nhanes_oral_mirco_cho/data/fonts",
            pattern = "arial.*\\.ttf$",
            prompt = FALSE)

# Register for the PDF device
loadfonts(device = "pdf")  # (You only need to import & loadfonts once per project/session)

# Unlike ggplot2's relative spacing, we define ABSOLUTE measurements
FONT_SIZE_PT <- 6                    # Base font size in points
ROW_HEIGHT_PT <- 5                   # FIXED physical row height in points (font + padding)
POINTS_TO_MM <- 25.4 / 72           # Conversion factor: points to millimeters
TEXT_MARGIN_PT <- 1                  # Fixed margin for text positioning

# Calculate EXACT plot dimensions based on PHYSICAL row count
calc_exact_plot_dimensions <- function(n_rows, plot_width_mm = 300, calibrate_y_mm = 0) {
  # Each row is roughly ROW_HEIGHT_PT points tall
  total_plot_height_pt <- n_rows * ROW_HEIGHT_PT
  plot_height_mm <- total_plot_height_pt * POINTS_TO_MM
  # Add minimal margins (same for all plots)
  margin_mm <- 10
  # Apply manual calibration - positive expands, negative compresses
  calibrated_height_mm <- plot_height_mm + margin_mm + calibrate_y_mm
  # Return exact dimensions
  list(
    width_mm = plot_width_mm,
    height_mm = calibrated_height_mm,
    plot_height_pt = total_plot_height_pt,
    n_rows = n_rows,
    row_height_pt = ROW_HEIGHT_PT,
    calibration_mm = calibrate_y_mm
  )
}

# FLEXIBLE PREFIX LOGIC - for subsetting plots
# Helper function to filter data by flexible prefixes
filter_by_flexible_prefixes <- function(df, prefix_subsets, variable_column = "host_variable_column") {
  if (is.null(prefix_subsets)) {
    return(df)
  }
  
  # Create a logical vector for filtering
  matches <- logical(nrow(df))
  
  # Check each prefix (case-insensitive)
  for (prefix in prefix_subsets) {
    prefix_matches <- startsWith(toupper(df[[variable_column]]), toupper(prefix))
    matches <- matches | prefix_matches
  }
  
  cat("  Prefix filtering results:\n")
  for (prefix in prefix_subsets) {
    prefix_count <- sum(startsWith(toupper(df[[variable_column]]), toupper(prefix)))
    cat("    '", prefix, "': ", prefix_count, " variables significant \t", sep = "")
  }
  cat("  Total significant variables after filtering:", sum(matches), "out of", nrow(df), "\n")
  
  return(df[matches, ])
}

# Helper function to extract variable prefixes (flexible length)
extract_variable_prefix <- function(variable_names, target_prefixes = NULL, default_length = 3) {
  if (is.null(target_prefixes)) {
    # Default behavior: extract first 3 characters
    return(substr(variable_names, 1, default_length))
  }
  
  # For each variable, find which target prefix it matches (if any)
  prefixes <- character(length(variable_names))
  
  for (i in seq_along(variable_names)) {
    var_name <- variable_names[i]
    matched <- FALSE
    
    # Check each target prefix (longest first to avoid partial matches)
    for (prefix in target_prefixes[order(nchar(target_prefixes), decreasing = TRUE)]) {
      if (startsWith(toupper(var_name), toupper(prefix))) {
        prefixes[i] <- prefix
        matched <- TRUE
        break
      }
    }
    # If no match found, use default 3-character prefix
    if (!matched) {
      prefixes[i] <- substr(var_name, 1, default_length)
    }
  }
  
  return(prefixes)
}

# Helper function to  Calculate dot size based on p-value significance
calc_dot_size <- function(p) {
  case_when(
    p < 1e-6  ~ 3.5,   # Largest dots for most significant associations
    p < 1e-5  ~ 3,
    p < 1e-4  ~ 2.5,
    p < 1e-3  ~ 2,
    p < 1e-2  ~ 1.5,
    TRUE      ~ 1   # Small dots for FDR 0.05 < FDR 0.01
  )
}

# Prepare dataset by determining which column contains OTUs vs host variables
prepare_dataset <- function(df) {
  # Count matches to determine column roles
  dep_matches_otu <- sum(df$dependent_var == df$otu, na.rm = TRUE)
  ind_matches_otu <- sum(df$independent_var == df$otu, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  if (dep_matches_otu > ind_matches_otu) {
    # dependent_var contains OTUs, independent_var contains host variables
    df_clean <- df %>% 
      mutate(otu_column = dependent_var, host_variable_column = independent_var)
  } else {
    # independent_var contains OTUs, dependent_var contains host variables  
    df_clean <- df %>% 
      mutate(otu_column = independent_var, host_variable_column = dependent_var)
  }
  
  # Clean OTU names by removing _relative suffix for mapping
  df_clean %>% mutate(otu_clean = str_remove(otu, "_relative$"))
}

##################################################
# HOST variable type colors for plots - includes both short and long prefixes
host_variable_colors <- c(
  "DUM" = "#FFFFFF",
  # Original 3-character prefixes
  "RID" = "#E69F00", "AGE" = "#56B4E9", "BOR" = "#009E73", "ETH" = "#F0E442", "RIA" = "#CC6677",
  "IND" = "#D55E00", "EDU" = "#DDA0DD", "RSV" = "#999999", "LBX" = "#332288", "URX" = "#44AA99",
  "SMQ" = "#88CCEE", "LBD" = "#117733", "DS1" = "#DDDDDD", "DSQ" = "#0072B2", "HOQ" = "#000000",
  "DR1" = "#AD7700", "DS2" = "#882255", "DR2" = "#661100", "PAQ" = "#6699CC", "GUM" = "#AA4499",
  "ORA" = "#DDCC77", "TOO" = "#117733", "DEN" = "#88CCEE", "CAN" = "#332288", "HEA" = "#E69F00",
  "EMP" = "#56B4E9", "STR" = "#009E73", "ANG" = "#F0E442", "CHD" = "#CC6677", "CVD" = "#D55E00",
  "DIA" = "#DDA0DD", "AST" = "#999999", "BRO" = "#AD7700", "BMX" = "#44AA99", "BPX" = "#88CCEE",
  
  # NEW: Longer prefixes for your specific variables
  "CANCER" = "#FF6B6B",        # For CANCER_BREAST, CANCER_PROSTATE
  "DIABETES" = "#45B7D1",      # For DIABETES variables
  "HEART" = "#4ECDC4",         # For HEART_FAILURE, HEART_ATTACK
  "ASTHMA" = "#96CEB4",        # For ASTHMA variables
  "BRONCHITIS" = "#FFEAA7",    # For BRONCHITIS variables
  "EMPHYSEMA" = "#DDA0DD",     # For EMPHYSEMA variables
  "ANGINA" = "#74B9FF",        # For ANGINA variables
  "STROKE" = "#A0E7E5"         # For STROKE variables
)

##################################################
# 6) ANNOTATION LOGIC - CONSISTENT ACROSS PLOT TYPES
##################################################
create_annotations <- function(df_plot, plot_type, min_annotations = 4, annotate_na = FALSE) {
  # Define the consistent dummy label used across all plots for margin control
  DUMMY_LABEL <- "{DUMMY_PADDING_ROW_FOR_CONSISTENT_MARGINS_ACROSS_ALL_PLOTS_DUMMY_}"
  
  if (plot_type == "otu") {
    # For OTU plots: annotate host variable types for each genus row
    # Y-axis = microbial genera, annotations = host variable types
    df_annotate <- df_plot %>%
      filter(row_label != DUMMY_LABEL) %>%  # Exclude dummy rows from annotations
      group_by(row_label) %>%               # Group by genus (y-axis categories)
      arrange(desc(abs(estimate)), desc(dot_size)) %>%  # Highest regression estimate first, then order by significant associations
      slice_head(n = min_annotations) %>%  # Take top N annotations per genus
      ungroup() %>%
      mutate(annotation_label = paste0(host_prefix, " (", round(estimate, 2), ")"))  # Format: PREFIX (estimate)
  }
  
  if (plot_type == "host") {
    # For HOST plots: annotate genus names for each host variable row
    # Y-axis = host variables, annotations = microbial genera
    df_annotate <- df_plot %>%
      filter(row_label != DUMMY_LABEL) %>%  # Exclude dummy rows from annotations
      group_by(row_label) %>%               # Group by host variable (y-axis categories)
      arrange(desc(abs(estimate)), desc(dot_size)) %>%  # Highest regression estimate first, then order by significant associations
      slice_head(n = min_annotations) %>%  # Take top N annotations per host variable
      ungroup() %>%
      mutate(
        annotation_label = if_else(
          Genus == "unclassified" | is.na(Genus), 
          "NA",     # Show "NA" for unclassified microbes
          Genus     # Show genus name for classified microbes
        )
      )
    
    # Remove NA annotations if not wanted
    if (!annotate_na) {
      df_annotate <- df_annotate %>% 
        filter(Genus != "unclassified" & !is.na(Genus))
    }
  }
  
  return(df_annotate)
}
# Grafify color palette for automatic variable coloring
grafify_all_colors <- c(
  "#E69F00", "#56B4E9", "#009E73", "#F0E442", "#0072B2", "#D55E00", "#CC79A7", "#332288", "#88ccee", "#44aa99", "#117733",
  "#999933", "#ddcc77", "#cc6677", "#882255", "#aa4499", "#77aadd", "#99ddff", "#44bb99", "#bbcc33", "#aaaa00", "#eedd88",
  "#ee8866", "#ffaabb", "#bbccee", "#cceeff", "#ccddaa", "#eeeebb", "#ffcccc", "#dddddd", "#555555", "#bbbbbb", "#999999",
  "#ffffff", "#ddaa33", "#bb5566", "#004488", "#000000", "#0077bb", "#33bbee", "#009988", "#ee7733", "#cc3311", "#ee3377",
  "#222255", "#225555", "#225522", "#666633", "#663333", "#4477aa", "#66ccee", "#228833", "#ccbb44", "#ee6677", "#aa3377"
)

# Function to get colors for variables, with automatic assignment for unmapped ones
get_variable_colors <- function(variable_names, base_colors = host_variable_colors) {
  unique_vars <- unique(variable_names)
  color_map <- base_colors
  
  # Find variables that don't have predefined colors
  unmapped_vars <- setdiff(unique_vars, names(color_map))
  
  if (length(unmapped_vars) > 0) {
    # Assign colors from grafify palette to unmapped variables
    n_needed <- length(unmapped_vars)
    assigned_colors <- grafify_all_colors[1:n_needed]  # Take first N colors
    names(assigned_colors) <- unmapped_vars
    color_map <- c(color_map, assigned_colors)
  }
  
  return(color_map)
}

##################################################
# CORE PLOTTING FUNCTION WITH PREFIX-subsetting SUPPORT
##################################################
plot_and_save <- function(df, plot_type = "otu", file_prefix, width_mm = 115, calibrate_y_mm = 0,
                          genus_mapping, ubiome_variable_mapping, phylum_df, phylum_colors, 
                          split_by_prefix = FALSE, prefix_subsets = NULL, 
                          remove_na = FALSE, remove_na_unclassified = FALSE, 
                          annotate_na = FALSE, xlim = NULL, min_annotations = 4,
                          add_annotations = TRUE, show_legend = FALSE,
                          color_by_variable = FALSE, # This will color by prefix or color by each variable based on grafify colors
                          dummy_top_bottom = "bottom" # "top", "bottom", or "split"
                          ) {  
  
  # Step 1: Prepare the dataset - determine OTU vs host variable columns
  df <- prepare_dataset(df)
  
  # Step 2: ENHANCED - Filter by prefix subsets with flexible length matching
  if (!is.null(prefix_subsets)) {
    cat("  Original variables:", length(unique(df$host_variable_column)), "\n")
    df <- filter_by_flexible_prefixes(df, prefix_subsets, "host_variable_column")
    
    if (nrow(df) == 0) {
      warning(paste("No variables found matching prefixes:", paste(prefix_subsets, collapse = ", ")))
      return(NULL)
    }
  }
  
  # Step 3: Join with mapping tables and calculate dot sizes based on significance
  df2 <- df %>%
    distinct(otu_clean, estimate, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%              # Remove duplicate associations
    left_join(genus_mapping %>% distinct(otu, .keep_all = TRUE),     # Join genus taxonomy info
              by = c("otu_clean" = "otu")) %>%
    mutate(dot_size = calc_dot_size(p.value.fdr)) %>%               # Calculate dot sizes from p-values
    filter(!is.na(dot_size))                                        # Remove invalid entries
  
  # Step 4: Remove unclassified microbes if requested
  if (remove_na_unclassified) {
    df2 <- df2 %>% filter(Genus != "unclassified" & !is.na(Genus))
  }
  
  # Step 5: Check if we have data to plot
  if (nrow(df2) == 0) {
    warning(paste("No significant results for", plot_type, "plot:", file_prefix))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Step 6: Add CONSISTENT dummy row for margin control
  DUMMY_LABEL <- "{DUMMY_PADDING_ROW_FOR_CONSISTENT_MARGINS_ACROSS_ALL_PLOTS_DUMMY_}"
  
  if (plot_type == "otu") {
    # Step 7a: Prepare OTU plot data with FLEXIBLE prefix extraction
      df2 <- df2 %>%
        mutate(
          # Create row labels (genus names or NA + OTU ID for unclassified) 
          row_label = if_else(Genus == "unclassified" | is.na(Genus), 
                             paste0("NA; ", otu_clean), Genus),
          # ENHANCED: Extract prefixes OR use full variable names for coloring (OTU plots only)
          host_prefix = if (color_by_variable) {
            host_variable_column  # Use full variable name for coloring
          } else {
            extract_variable_prefix(host_variable_column, prefix_subsets)  # Use prefix for coloring
          }
        )
      
      # Debug: Show variable coloring info (MOVED OUTSIDE mutate)
      if (color_by_variable) {
        cat("  Color by variable mode: Each variable gets unique color\n")
        cat("  Variables:", paste(head(unique(df2$host_prefix), 10), collapse = ", "), 
            if(length(unique(df2$host_prefix)) > 10) "..." else "", "\n")
      }
    # Add TWO dummy rows with appropriate prefix
    dummy_prefix <- if (!is.null(prefix_subsets) && length(prefix_subsets) > 0) {
      prefix_subsets[1]  # Use first specified prefix for dummy
    } else {
      "DUM"  # Default dummy prefix
    }
    
    dummy_rows <- tibble(
      otu_clean = c("DUMMY_OTU_1", "DUMMY_OTU_2"),
      estimate = c(0, 0),         # Negative and positive estimates
      p.value.fdr = c(1e-12, 1e-12),   # FDR 10^-12
      Genus = c(DUMMY_LABEL, DUMMY_LABEL),
      row_label = c(DUMMY_LABEL, paste0(DUMMY_LABEL, "_2")),
      dot_size = c(3.5, 3.5),        # full size dots
      host_prefix = c(dummy_prefix, dummy_prefix)
    )
    df2 <- bind_rows(df2, dummy_rows)
    
    # Step 8a: Order rows consistently with dummy positioning control
    assoc_counts <- df2 %>%
      group_by(row_label) %>%
      summarise(Total_Assoc = n(), .groups = "drop")
    
    # Separate dummies from real data
    dummy_rows <- assoc_counts %>% 
      filter(str_detect(row_label, "DUMMY_PADDING_ROW_FOR_CONSISTENT_MARGINS"))
    real_rows <- assoc_counts %>% 
      filter(!str_detect(row_label, "DUMMY_PADDING_ROW_FOR_CONSISTENT_MARGINS")) %>%
      arrange(Total_Assoc, desc(row_label))  # Original ordering for real data
    
    # Apply dummy positioning
    if (dummy_top_bottom == "top") {
      # Put both dummies at top
      final_order <- c(dummy_rows$row_label, real_rows$row_label)
    } else if (dummy_top_bottom == "split") {
      # Put one dummy at top, one at bottom
      dummy_1 <- dummy_rows$row_label[1]
      dummy_2 <- dummy_rows$row_label[2]
      final_order <- c(dummy_1, real_rows$row_label, dummy_2)
    } else {
      # Default: both dummies at bottom
      final_order <- c(real_rows$row_label, dummy_rows$row_label)
    }
    df2$row_label <- factor(df2$row_label, levels = final_order)


    n_rows <- length(levels(df2$row_label))
    
    # Step 9a: Create annotations for OTU plot (host variable types per genus)
    df_annotate <- if (add_annotations) {
      create_annotations(df2, plot_type = "otu", 
                        min_annotations = min_annotations, annotate_na = annotate_na)
    } else { 
      tibble()  # Empty tibble for no annotations
    }
    
    # Step 10a: Calculate x-axis limits with 0 centered (symmetric around zero)
    if (is.null(xlim)) {
      # Find maximum absolute estimate (excluding dummy row) 
      max_abs_estimate <- max(abs(df2$estimate[df2$row_label != DUMMY_LABEL]), na.rm = TRUE)
      xlim <- c(-max_abs_estimate * 1.15, max_abs_estimate * 1.15)  # Symmetric around 0
    }
    
    # Step 11a: Create the OTU plot
    p <- ggplot(df2, aes(x = estimate, y = row_label, fill = host_prefix, size = dot_size)) +
      # Add vertical reference line at x=0
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.3, alpha = 0.8) +
      
      # Add the main dots representing associations
      geom_point(shape = 21, alpha = 0.65, stroke = 0.2) +
      
      # Add text annotations if requested
      {if (add_annotations && nrow(df_annotate) > 0) {
        geom_text_repel(
          data = df_annotate, 
          aes(label = annotation_label), 
          # size = 1.2,    
          # size = 1.5,                        # For font size ~4pt
          size = 1.8,                       # For font size ~5pt  
          # size = 2.1,                      # For font size ~6pt
         box.padding = 0.5,                 
          point.padding = 0.3,               
          segment.color = "gray60",          
          segment.size = 0.25,               
          max.overlaps = 15,                 
          min.segment.length = 0.1           
        )
      } else { 
        NULL 
      }} +
      # Configure size scale with legend when requested
      {if (show_legend) {
        scale_size_continuous(
          name = "Significance",
          breaks = c(1, 1.5, 2, 2.5, 3, 3.5),
          labels = c("FDR < 0.05", "FDR < 0.01", "FDR < 0.001", "FDR < 0.0001", "FDR < 0.00001", "FDR < 0.000001"),
          range = c(1, 3.5),
          guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(fill = "gray50"))
        )
      } else {
        scale_size_identity()
      }} +
      
      # Configure color scale for host variable types
      # Configure color scale for host variable types with dynamic assignment
      scale_fill_manual(values = get_variable_colors(df2$host_prefix)) +
      
      # Configure axes
      scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
      scale_x_continuous(limits = xlim, expand = c(0.01, 0.01)) +
      
      # Apply theme
      egg::theme_article(base_size = 6, base_family = "ArialMT") +
      
      #  Minimal theme overrides
      theme(
        # ADD THESE GRID LINES:
        panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.1, linetype = "solid"),
        panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
        
        axis.text.y = element_text(
          size = 6,                                              
          margin = margin(r = TEXT_MARGIN_PT, unit = "pt"),      
          hjust = 1,                                             
          lineheight  = 0.9                                       
        ),

        axis.text.x = element_text(
          size = 6,                                              
          margin = margin(t = TEXT_MARGIN_PT, unit = "pt")       
        ),
        axis.ticks.y = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "black"),
        axis.ticks.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "black"),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(1, "pt"),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black", linewidth = 0.3),
        plot.margin = margin(t = 2, r = 2, b = 2, l = 2, unit = "pt"),
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_blank(),
        legend.position = if(show_legend) "bottom" else "none",
        legend.box = if(show_legend) "horizontal" else NULL  # ADD THIS LINE to arrange legends side by side
      )
  }
  
  else if (plot_type == "host") {
    # Step 7b: Prepare HOST plot data with FLEXIBLE prefix extraction
    df2 <- df2 %>%
      # Join with phylum information for coloring dots by microbial taxonomy
      left_join(phylum_df %>% distinct(otu, .keep_all = TRUE), 
                by = c("otu_clean" = "otu")) %>%
      # Join with variable descriptions for readable row labels
      left_join(ubiome_variable_mapping %>% dplyr::select(var_name, var_description), 
                by = c("host_variable_column" = "var_name")) %>%
      mutate(
        # ENHANCED: Determine prefix grouping with flexible length
        host_prefix = if (split_by_prefix) {
          extract_variable_prefix(host_variable_column, prefix_subsets)
        } else {
          "All"
        },
        # Use description if available, otherwise use variable name
        row_label = if_else(is.na(var_description), host_variable_column, var_description)
      )
    
    # Add TWO dummy row(s) - same structure for consistent margins
    if (split_by_prefix) {
      # TWO dummy rows per prefix group for faceted plots
      unique_prefixes <- unique(df2$host_prefix)
      dummy_rows <- map_dfr(unique_prefixes, ~ tibble(
        otu_clean = c("DUMMY_OTU_1", "DUMMY_OTU_2"),
        estimate = c(0, 0),
        p.value.fdr = c(1e-12, 1e-12),
        Phylum = c("Unclassified", "Unclassified"),
        Genus = c(DUMMY_LABEL, DUMMY_LABEL),
        row_label = c(DUMMY_LABEL, paste0(DUMMY_LABEL, "_2")),
        dot_size = c(3.5, 3.5), 
        host_prefix = c(.x, .x),
        host_variable_column = c(DUMMY_LABEL, DUMMY_LABEL)
      ))
    } else {
      # TWO dummy rows for non-faceted plots
      dummy_rows <- tibble(
        otu_clean = c("DUMMY_OTU_1", "DUMMY_OTU_2"),
        estimate = c(0, 0),
        p.value.fdr = c(1e-12, 1e-12),
        Phylum = c("Unclassified", "Unclassified"), 
        Genus = c(DUMMY_LABEL, DUMMY_LABEL),
        row_label = c(DUMMY_LABEL, paste0(DUMMY_LABEL, "_2")),
        dot_size = c(3.5, 3.5),
        host_prefix = c("All", "All"),
        host_variable_column = c(DUMMY_LABEL, DUMMY_LABEL)
      )
    }
    df2 <- bind_rows(df2, dummy_rows)
    
    # Step 8b: Order rows consistently
    if (split_by_prefix) {
      # Order within each prefix group (for faceted plots) - keep existing logic
      assoc_counts <- df2 %>%
        group_by(host_prefix, row_label) %>%
        summarise(Total_Assoc = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
        arrange(host_prefix, Total_Assoc, desc(row_label))
      
      df2 <- df2 %>%
        group_by(host_prefix) %>%
        mutate(row_label = factor(row_label, 
                                 levels = unique(assoc_counts$row_label[assoc_counts$host_prefix == first(host_prefix)]))) %>%
        ungroup()
    } else {
      # Single ordering for non-faceted plots WITH dummy positioning
      assoc_counts <- df2 %>%
        group_by(row_label) %>%
        summarise(Total_Assoc = n(), .groups = "drop")
      
      # Separate dummies from real data
      dummy_rows <- assoc_counts %>% 
        filter(str_detect(row_label, "DUMMY_PADDING_ROW_FOR_CONSISTENT_MARGINS"))
      real_rows <- assoc_counts %>% 
        filter(!str_detect(row_label, "DUMMY_PADDING_ROW_FOR_CONSISTENT_MARGINS")) %>%
        arrange(Total_Assoc, desc(row_label))  # Original ordering for real data
      
      # Apply dummy positioning
      if (dummy_top_bottom == "top") {
        # Put both dummies at top
        final_order <- c(dummy_rows$row_label, real_rows$row_label)
      } else if (dummy_top_bottom == "split") {
        # Put one dummy at top, one at bottom
        dummy_1 <- dummy_rows$row_label[1]
        dummy_2 <- dummy_rows$row_label[2]
        final_order <- c(dummy_1, real_rows$row_label, dummy_2)
      } else {
        # Default: both dummies at bottom
        final_order <- c(real_rows$row_label, dummy_rows$row_label)
      }
      
      df2$row_label <- factor(df2$row_label, levels = final_order)
    }
          
    n_rows <- length(levels(df2$row_label))
    
    # Step 9b: Create annotations for HOST plot (genus names per host variable)
    df_annotate <- if (add_annotations) {
      create_annotations(df2, plot_type = "host", 
                        min_annotations = min_annotations, annotate_na = annotate_na)
    } else { 
      tibble()  # Empty tibble for no annotations
    }
    
    # Step 10b: Calculate x-axis limits with 0 centered
    if (is.null(xlim)) {
      # Find maximum absolute estimate (excluding dummy row)
      max_abs_estimate <- max(abs(df2$estimate[df2$row_label != DUMMY_LABEL]), na.rm = TRUE)
      xlim <- c(-max_abs_estimate * 1.15, max_abs_estimate * 1.15)  # Symmetric around 0
    }
    
    # Step 11b: Create the HOST plot
    p <- ggplot(df2, aes(x = estimate, y = row_label, fill = Phylum, size = dot_size)) +
      # Add vertical reference line at x=0
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.3, alpha = 0.8) +
      
      # Add the main dots representing associations
      geom_point(shape = 21, alpha = 0.65, stroke = 0.15) +
      
      # Add text annotations if requested
      {if (add_annotations && nrow(df_annotate) > 0) {
        geom_text_repel(
          data = df_annotate, 
          aes(label = annotation_label), 
          # size = 1.2,          
          # size = 1.5,                        # For font size ~4pt
          size = 1.8,                      # For font size ~5pt
          # size = 2.1,                      # For font size ~6pt
          box.padding = 0.5,                 
          point.padding = 0.3,               
          segment.color = "gray60",          
          segment.size = 0.25,               
          max.overlaps = 15,                 
          min.segment.length = 0.1           
        )
      } else { 
        NULL 
      }} +
      # Configure size scale with legend when requested
      {if (show_legend) {
        scale_size_continuous(
          name = "Significance",
          breaks = c(1, 1.5, 2, 2.5, 3, 3.5),
          labels = c("FDR < 0.05", "FDR < 0.01", "FDR < 0.001", "FDR < 0.0001", "FDR < 0.00001", "FDR < 0.000001"),
          range = c(1, 3.5),
          guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(fill = "gray50"))
        )
      } else {
        scale_size_identity()
      }} +
      
      # Configure color scale for microbial phylums
      scale_fill_manual(values = phylum_colors, na.value = "grey90") +
      
      # Configure axes
      scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
      scale_x_continuous(limits = xlim, expand = c(0.0005, 0.0005)) +
      
      # Apply theme 
      egg::theme_article(base_size = 6, base_family = "ArialMT") +
      
      # Minimal theme overrides

      theme(
        # ADD THESE GRID LINES:
        panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.1, linetype = "solid"),
        panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
        
        axis.text.y = element_text(
          size = 6,                                              
          margin = margin(r = TEXT_MARGIN_PT, unit = "pt"),      
          hjust = 1,                                             
          lineheight  = 0.9                                       
        ),
        axis.text.x = element_text(
          size = 6,                                              
          margin = margin(t = TEXT_MARGIN_PT, unit = "pt")       
        ),
        axis.ticks.y = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "black"),
        axis.ticks.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "black"),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(1, "pt"),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black", linewidth = 0.3),
        plot.margin = margin(t = 2, r = 2, b = 2, l = 2, unit = "pt"),
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_blank(),
        legend.position = if(show_legend) "bottom" else "none",
        legend.box = if(show_legend) "horizontal" else NULL  # ADD THIS LINE to arrange legends side by side
)
    
    # Add faceting if requested (split by host variable prefix)
    if (split_by_prefix) {
      p <- p + facet_wrap(~host_prefix, scales = "free_y")
    }
  }
  
  # Step 12: Calculate EXACT plot dimensions based on row count + manual calibration
  dims <- calc_exact_plot_dimensions(n_rows, width_mm, calibrate_y_mm)
  
  # Step 13: Print dimension information for verification
  cat("Creating:", file_prefix, "\n")
  # cat("  Rows:", n_rows, "@ exactly", ROW_HEIGHT_PT, "pt each\n")
  if (!is.null(prefix_subsets)) {
    cat("  Filtered by prefixes:", paste(prefix_subsets, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  }
  # cat("  Plot height:", round(dims$plot_height_pt, 1), "pt =", round(dims$height_mm - dims$calibration_mm - 10, 1), "mm\n")
  # if (calibrate_y_mm != 0) {
  #   cat("  Manual calibration:", calibrate_y_mm, "mm", if(calibrate_y_mm > 0) "(expanded)" else "(compressed)", "\n")
  # }
  # cat("  Total PDF:", dims$width_mm, "×", round(dims$height_mm, 1), "mm\n")
  
  # Step 14: Save the plot with exact dimensions
  file_name <- paste0(file_prefix, ".pdf")
  save_pdf_figure(file_name, plot_obj = p, 
                  width_mm = dims$width_mm, height_mm = dims$height_mm)
  
  return(p)
}

##################################################
# 8) DATA SETUP
##################################################
# Create phylum mapping for color coding in HOST plots
phylum_info <- data.frame(
  otu = rownames(tax_table(ubiome_relative)),
  Phylum = as.character(tax_table(ubiome_relative)[, "Phylum"]),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Create genus mapping for row labels in OTU plots
genus_mapping <- data.frame(
  otu = rownames(tax_table(ubiome_relative)),
  Genus = tax_table(ubiome_relative)[, "Genus"],
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Organize all datasets with corrected naming
datasets <- list(
  demowas_none      = demoWAS_none_sig_res,
  demowas_clr       = demoWAS_clr_sig_res,
  demowas_hellinger = demoWAS_hellinger_sig_res,
  # demowas_lognorm   = demoWAS_lognorm_sig_res,

  oradwas_none      = oradWAS_none_sig_res,
  oradwas_clr       = oradWAS_clr_sig_res,
  oradwas_hellinger = oradWAS_hellinger_sig_res,
  # oradwas_lognorm   = oradWAS_lognorm_sig_res,

  exwas_none        = exWAS_none_sig_res,
  exwas_clr         = exWAS_clr_sig_res,
  exwas_hellinger   = exWAS_hellinger_sig_res,
  # exwas_lognorm     = exWAS_lognorm_sig_res,

  phewas_none       = pheWAS_none_sig_res,
  phewas_clr        = pheWAS_clr_sig_res,
  phewas_hellinger  = pheWAS_hellinger_sig_res,
  # phewas_lognorm    = pheWAS_lognorm_sig_res,

  outwas_none       = outWAS_none_sig_res,
  outwas_clr        = outWAS_clr_sig_res,
  outwas_hellinger  = outWAS_hellinger_sig_res,
  # outwas_lognorm    = outWAS_lognorm_sig_res,

  zimwas_none       = zimWAS_none_sig_res,
  zimwas_clr        = zimWAS_clr_sig_res,
  zimwas_hellinger  = zimWAS_hellinger_sig_res #,
  # zimwas_lognorm    = zimWAS_lognorm_sig_res
)
```

```{R Indicies-plot-function-definition}
##################################################
# INDICES PLOTTING FUNCTION - 
##################################################
# Load required libraries for plotting
library(ggplot2)
library(data.table)
library(egg)  # For theme_article
library(readr)  # For read_csv
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)

# Set UTF-8 locale to handle special characters
Sys.setlocale("LC_ALL", "en_US.UTF-8")

# Use the same physical constants as Terry plots
FONT_SIZE_PT <- 6                    # Base font size in points
ROW_HEIGHT_PT <- 5                   # FIXED physical row height in points (font + padding)
POINTS_TO_MM <- 25.4 / 72           # Conversion factor: points to millimeters
TEXT_MARGIN_PT <- 1                  # Fixed margin for text positioning

# Same dummy label for consistency
DUMMY_LABEL <- "{DUMMY_PADDING_ROW_FOR_CONSISTENT_MARGINS_ACROSS_ALL_PLOTS_DUMMY_}"

# Association direction colors with alpha = 0.65
association_colors <- c(
  "Negative" = "#0072B2",  # Blue for negative associations
  "Positive" = "#CC6677"   # Vermillion for positive associations
)

# Prepare dataset by determining which column contains OTUs vs host variables
prepare_dataset <- function(df) {
  # Count matches to determine column roles
  dep_matches_otu <- sum(df$dependent_var == df$otu, na.rm = TRUE)
  ind_matches_otu <- sum(df$independent_var == df$otu, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  if (dep_matches_otu > ind_matches_otu) {
    # dependent_var contains OTUs, independent_var contains host variables
    df_clean <- df %>% 
      mutate(otu_column = dependent_var, host_variable_column = independent_var)
  } else {
    # independent_var contains OTUs, dependent_var contains host variables  
    df_clean <- df %>% 
      mutate(otu_column = independent_var, host_variable_column = dependent_var)
  }
  
  # Clean OTU names by removing _relative suffix for mapping
  df_clean %>% mutate(otu_clean = str_remove(otu, "_relative$"))
}
##################################################
plot_indices <- function(df, plot_type = "host", file_prefix = "indices", width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 0,
                        mapping_data, genus_mapping, ubiome_variable_mapping, 
                        prefix_subsets = NULL, remove_na = FALSE, remove_na_unclassified = FALSE,
                        show_legend = TRUE, dummy_top_bottom = "split",
                        hide_axis_title = FALSE, geom_point_shape = 21, geom_point_size = 3.5) {
  
  # Step 1: Prepare the dataset - determine OTU vs host variable columns
  df <- prepare_dataset(df)
  
  # Step 2: Filter by prefix subsets with flexible length matching
  if (!is.null(prefix_subsets)) {
    cat("  Original variables:", length(unique(df$host_variable_column)), "\n")
    df <- filter_by_flexible_prefixes(df, prefix_subsets, "host_variable_column")
    
    if (nrow(df) == 0) {
      warning(paste("No variables found matching prefixes:", paste(prefix_subsets, collapse = ", ")))
      return(NULL)
    }
  }
  
  # Step 3: Join with genus mapping for remove_na_unclassified logic
  df <- df %>%
    left_join(genus_mapping %>% distinct(otu, .keep_all = TRUE),     
              by = c("otu_clean" = "otu"))
  
  # Step 4: Apply remove_na_unclassified filter if requested
  if (remove_na_unclassified) {
    df <- df %>% filter(Genus != "unclassified" & !is.na(Genus))
  }
  
  # Step 5: Check if we have data after filtering
  if (nrow(df) == 0) {
    warning(paste("No data remaining after filtering for", file_prefix))
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Convert to data.table for processing
  setDT(df)
  setDT(mapping_data)
  
  if (plot_type == "host") { 
    # HOST INDICES PLOT
    
    # Merge with mapping data
    plot_data_host <- merge(
      df[, .(otu_clean, estimate, host_var = host_variable_column)], 
      mapping_data[, .(otu, STAIN_INDEX, OXYGEN_INDEX, MOTILITY_INDEX, SPORULATION_INDEX)], 
      by.x = "otu_clean", by.y = "otu", all.x = TRUE
    )
    
    # Add TWO dummy rows for consistency
    dummy_rows <- data.table(
      otu_clean = c("DUMMY_OTU_1", "DUMMY_OTU_2"),
      estimate = c(0, 0), 
      host_var = c(DUMMY_LABEL, paste0(DUMMY_LABEL, "_2")),  # ← FIX: Use DUMMY_LABEL
      STAIN_INDEX = c(0, 1), 
      OXYGEN_INDEX = c(0, 1), 
      MOTILITY_INDEX = c(0, 1), 
      SPORULATION_INDEX = c(0, 1)
    )
    plot_data_host <- rbind(plot_data_host, dummy_rows)
    
    # Join with variable descriptions
    plot_data_host <- merge(plot_data_host, ubiome_variable_mapping, 
                           by.x = "host_var", by.y = "var_name", all.x = TRUE)
    plot_data_host[host_var %in% c(DUMMY_LABEL, paste0(DUMMY_LABEL, "_2")), 
                   var_description := host_var]
    
    # Transform to long format
    plot_data_long_host <- melt(plot_data_host, 
                               id.vars = c("otu_clean", "host_var", "var_description", "estimate"), 
                               measure.vars = c("STAIN_INDEX", "OXYGEN_INDEX", "MOTILITY_INDEX", "SPORULATION_INDEX"),
                               variable.name = "Index_Type", 
                               value.name = "Index_Value")
    
    # Update index type labels - CONVERT TO CHARACTER TO PRESERVE ORDER
    if (hide_axis_title) {
      plot_data_long_host[, Index_Type := factor(Index_Type, 
                                                levels = c("STAIN_INDEX", "OXYGEN_INDEX", "MOTILITY_INDEX", "SPORULATION_INDEX"),
                                                labels = c("STAIN_INDEX", "OXYGEN_INDEX", "MOTILITY_INDEX", "SPORULATION_INDEX"))]
    } else {
      plot_data_long_host[, Index_Type := factor(Index_Type, 
                                                levels = c("STAIN_INDEX", "OXYGEN_INDEX", "MOTILITY_INDEX", "SPORULATION_INDEX"),
                                                labels = c("Gram Positivity (%)", "Oxygen Tolerance (%)", "Motility (%)", "Sporulating (%)"))]
    }
    # Convert to character to avoid factor level conflicts during rbind
    plot_data_long_host[, Index_Type := as.character(Index_Type)]
    plot_data_long_host[, Index_Value := as.numeric(Index_Value)]
    plot_data_long_host[, Assoc_Type := factor(ifelse(estimate < 0, "Negative", "Positive"), 
                                              levels = c("Negative", "Positive"))]
    
    # Handle missing values
    plot_data_long_host <- plot_data_long_host[, {
      n_valid <- sum(!is.na(Index_Value))
      if (n_valid == 0) {
        data.table(Index_Value = c(0.5 - 0.01, 0.5 + 0.01), 
                   Assoc_Type = factor(c("Negative", "Positive"), levels = c("Negative", "Positive")))
      } else if (n_valid == 1) {
        val <- Index_Value[!is.na(Index_Value)]
        assoc <- Assoc_Type[!is.na(Index_Value)]
        data.table(Index_Value = c(val, val - 0.01, val + 0.01), 
                   Assoc_Type = factor(c(assoc, "Negative", "Positive"), levels = c("Negative", "Positive")))
      } else {
        data.table(Index_Value = Index_Value, Assoc_Type = Assoc_Type)
      }
    }, by = .(var_description, Index_Type)]
    
    # Calculate associations
    assoc_data_host <- df[, .(Neg_Assoc = sum(estimate < 0, na.rm = TRUE), 
                             Pos_Assoc = sum(estimate > 0, na.rm = TRUE)), 
                         by = host_variable_column]
    
    # Add TWO dummy association rows
    # Calculate max absolute association count for centering
    max_abs_count <- max(abs(c(assoc_data_host$Neg_Assoc, assoc_data_host$Pos_Assoc)), na.rm = TRUE)
    
    # Add TWO dummy association rows with symmetric values to force centering
    # Add TWO dummy association rows with symmetric values to force centering
    dummy_assoc <- data.table(
      host_variable_column = c(DUMMY_LABEL, paste0(DUMMY_LABEL, "_2")), 
      Neg_Assoc = c(max_abs_count + 8.5, 0), 
      Pos_Assoc = c(0, max_abs_count + 8.5)
    )
    assoc_data_host <- rbind(assoc_data_host, dummy_assoc)
    
    # Join with descriptions
    assoc_data_host <- merge(assoc_data_host, ubiome_variable_mapping, 
                            by.x = "host_variable_column", by.y = "var_name", all.x = TRUE)
    assoc_data_host[host_variable_column %in% c(DUMMY_LABEL, paste0(DUMMY_LABEL, "_2")), 
                    var_description := host_variable_column]
    
    # Remove duplicates and calculate totals
    assoc_data_host <- assoc_data_host[!duplicated(var_description)]
    assoc_data_host[, Total_Assoc := Neg_Assoc + Pos_Assoc]
    
    # Apply dummy positioning logic (same as Terry plots)
    assoc_counts <- assoc_data_host[, .(var_description, Total_Assoc)]
    
    # Separate dummies from real data
    dummy_rows_order <- assoc_counts[str_detect(var_description, "DUMMY_PADDING_ROW_FOR_CONSISTENT_MARGINS")]
    real_rows_order <- assoc_counts[!str_detect(var_description, "DUMMY_PADDING_ROW_FOR_CONSISTENT_MARGINS")][order(Total_Assoc, dplyr::desc(var_description))]
    
    # Apply dummy positioning
    if (dummy_top_bottom == "top") {
      final_order <- c(dummy_rows_order$var_description, real_rows_order$var_description)
    } else if (dummy_top_bottom == "split") {
      dummy_1 <- dummy_rows_order$var_description[1]
      dummy_2 <- dummy_rows_order$var_description[2]
      final_order <- c(dummy_1, real_rows_order$var_description, dummy_2)
    } else {
      final_order <- c(real_rows_order$var_description, dummy_rows_order$var_description)
    }
    
    # Transform association data to long format
    assoc_data_long_host <- melt(assoc_data_host, 
                                id.vars = "var_description", 
                                measure.vars = c("Neg_Assoc", "Pos_Assoc"), 
                                variable.name = "Assoc_Type", 
                                value.name = "Count")
    assoc_data_long_host[Assoc_Type == "Neg_Assoc", Count := -Count]
    assoc_data_long_host[, Assoc_Type := factor(Assoc_Type, levels = c("Neg_Assoc", "Pos_Assoc"), 
                                               labels = c("Negative", "Positive"))]
    assoc_data_long_host[, Index_Type := "Association Direction Count"]
    # Convert to character to avoid factor level conflicts during rbind
    assoc_data_long_host[, Index_Type := as.character(Index_Type)]
    # Combine all data
    plot_data_combined <- rbind(
      plot_data_long_host[, .(var_description, Index_Type, Value = Index_Value, Assoc_Type)],
      assoc_data_long_host[, .(var_description, Index_Type, Value = Count, Assoc_Type)]
    )
    # Set factor levels AFTER rbind to ensure correct order
    if (hide_axis_title) {
      plot_data_combined[, Index_Type := factor(Index_Type, 
                                              levels = c("Association Direction Count", "STAIN_INDEX", "OXYGEN_INDEX", "MOTILITY_INDEX", "SPORULATION_INDEX"))]
    } else {
      plot_data_combined[, Index_Type := factor(Index_Type, 
                                              levels = c("Association Direction Count", "Gram Positivity (%)", "Oxygen Tolerance (%)", "Motility (%)", "Sporulating (%)"))]
    }
    
    # Set Y-axis order consistently
    plot_data_combined[, var_description := factor(var_description, levels = final_order)]
    
    # Calculate number of rows for dimension calculation
    n_rows <- length(levels(plot_data_combined$var_description))
    
    # Calculate mean values for points
    mean_data <- plot_data_combined[Index_Type != "Association Direction Count", 
                                   .(Mean_Value = mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE)), 
                                   by = .(var_description, Index_Type, Assoc_Type)]
    
    # Calculate association breaks
    assoc_max <- ceiling(max(abs(assoc_data_long_host$Count), na.rm = TRUE) / 5) * 5
    assoc_breaks <- seq(-assoc_max, assoc_max, by = 5)
    
    # Create the plot
    p <- ggplot(plot_data_combined, aes(x = Value, y = var_description)) +
      geom_violin(data = plot_data_combined[Index_Type != "Association Direction Count"], 
                  aes(fill = Assoc_Type), alpha = 0.65, color = "black", linewidth = 0.1, na.rm = TRUE, 
                  width = 0.8, scale = "width", position = "identity") +
      geom_point(data = mean_data,
           aes(x = Mean_Value, y = var_description, color = Assoc_Type, fill = Assoc_Type),
           shape = geom_point_shape, size = geom_point_size, alpha = 0.8, stroke = 0.1, na.rm = TRUE) +
      geom_bar(data = plot_data_combined[Index_Type == "Association Direction Count"], 
               aes(fill = Assoc_Type), stat = "identity", width = 0.8, alpha = 0.65) +
      geom_text(data = plot_data_combined[Index_Type == "Association Direction Count" & Value != 0], 
          aes(x = ifelse(Value < 0, Value - max(abs(Value)) * 0.02, Value + max(abs(Value)) * 0.02),
              y = var_description,
              label = abs(Value)),
          size = 1.5, color = "#555555", hjust = ifelse(plot_data_combined[Index_Type == "Association Direction Count" & Value != 0]$Value < 0, 1, 0)) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = association_colors, na.translate = FALSE) +
      scale_color_manual(values = association_colors, na.translate = FALSE) +
      geom_vline(aes(xintercept = ifelse(Index_Type == "Association Direction Count", 0, 0.5)), 
                 linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +

      # Add this new section to force proper x-axis limits per panel
      geom_blank(data = data.frame(
        Index_Type = if(hide_axis_title) {
          factor(c("STAIN_INDEX", "OXYGEN_INDEX", "MOTILITY_INDEX", "SPORULATION_INDEX"), 
                 levels = c("STAIN_INDEX", "OXYGEN_INDEX", "MOTILITY_INDEX", "SPORULATION_INDEX"))
        } else {
          factor(c("Gram Positivity (%)", "Oxygen Tolerance (%)", "Motility (%)", "Sporulating (%)"), 
                 levels = c("Gram Positivity (%)", "Oxygen Tolerance (%)", "Motility (%)", "Sporulating (%)"))
        },
        Value = rep(c(0, 1), 2),
        y_var = rep(levels(plot_data_combined[[if(plot_type == "host") "var_description" else "parsed_genus"]])[1], 8)
      ), aes(x = Value, y = y_var), inherit.aes = FALSE) +
      
      facet_wrap(~ Index_Type, nrow = 1, scales = "free_x") +

      scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = function(x) {
          if (length(x) == 0) return(NULL)  # Handle empty data
          if (max(x, na.rm = TRUE) <= 1) {
            c(0, 0.5, 1)
          } else {
            assoc_breaks
          }
        }, 
        labels = function(x) {
          if (length(x) == 0) return(NULL)  # Handle empty data
          x
        }
      ) +
      coord_cartesian(xlim = c(NA, NA)) +  # Let ggplot handle limits naturally
      scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
      
      # Apply Terry plot theme standards
      egg::theme_article(base_size = 6, base_family = "ArialMT") +
      theme(
        # Add horizontal grid lines
        panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.1, linetype = "solid"),
        panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
        
        axis.text.y = element_text(
          size = 6,                                              
          margin = margin(r = TEXT_MARGIN_PT, unit = "pt"),      
          hjust = 1,                                             
          lineheight = 0.9                                       
        ),
        axis.text.x = element_text(
          size = 6,                                              
          margin = margin(t = TEXT_MARGIN_PT, unit = "pt")       
        ),
        axis.ticks.y = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "black"),
        axis.ticks.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "black"),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(1, "pt"),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black", linewidth = 0.3),
        plot.margin = margin(t = 2, r = 2, b = 2, l = 2, unit = "pt"),
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_blank(),
        legend.position = if(show_legend) "bottom" else "none",
        legend.box = if(show_legend) "horizontal" else NULL,
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
        strip.text = if(hide_axis_title) element_blank() else element_text(size = 6, angle = 90, hjust = 0)
      )    
    # Set file suffix
    file_suffix <- "_host_indices.pdf"
    
  } else if (plot_type == "otu") {
    # OTU INDICES PLOT
    
    # Get unique OTUs and merge with mapping data
    unique_otus <- unique(df$otu_clean)
    plot_data_otu <- merge(
      df[, .(otu_clean, estimate, host_var = host_variable_column)], 
      mapping_data[otu %in% unique_otus, .(otu, parsed_genus, STAIN_INDEX, OXYGEN_INDEX, MOTILITY_INDEX, SPORULATION_INDEX)], 
      by.x = "otu_clean", by.y = "otu", all.x = TRUE
    )
    # Add TWO dummy rows for consistency
    dummy_rows <- data.table(
      otu_clean = c("DUMMY_OTU_1", "DUMMY_OTU_2"),
      estimate = c(0, 0), 
      host_var = c("DUMMY_HOST_1", "DUMMY_HOST_2"),
      parsed_genus = c(DUMMY_LABEL, paste0(DUMMY_LABEL, "_2")), 
      STAIN_INDEX = c(0, 1), 
      OXYGEN_INDEX = c(0, 1), 
      MOTILITY_INDEX = c(0, 1), 
      SPORULATION_INDEX = c(0, 1)
    )
    plot_data_otu <- rbind(plot_data_otu, dummy_rows)
    
    # Transform to long format
    plot_data_long_otu <- melt(plot_data_otu, 
                              id.vars = c("otu_clean", "parsed_genus", "estimate", "host_var"), 
                              measure.vars = c("STAIN_INDEX", "OXYGEN_INDEX", "MOTILITY_INDEX", "SPORULATION_INDEX"),
                              variable.name = "Index_Type", 
                              value.name = "Index_Value")
    # Update index type labels - CONVERT TO CHARACTER TO PRESERVE ORDER
    if (hide_axis_title) {
      plot_data_long_otu[, Index_Type := factor(Index_Type, 
                                               levels = c("STAIN_INDEX", "OXYGEN_INDEX", "MOTILITY_INDEX", "SPORULATION_INDEX"),
                                               labels = c("STAIN_INDEX", "OXYGEN_INDEX", "MOTILITY_INDEX", "SPORULATION_INDEX"))]
    } else {
      plot_data_long_otu[, Index_Type := factor(Index_Type, 
                                               levels = c("STAIN_INDEX", "OXYGEN_INDEX", "MOTILITY_INDEX", "SPORULATION_INDEX"),
                                               labels = c("Gram Positivity (%)", "Oxygen Tolerance (%)", "Motility (%)", "Sporulating (%)"))]
    }
    # Convert to character to avoid factor level conflicts during rbind
    plot_data_long_otu[, Index_Type := as.character(Index_Type)]
    plot_data_long_otu[, Index_Value := as.numeric(Index_Value)]
    plot_data_long_otu[, Assoc_Type := factor(ifelse(estimate < 0, "Negative", "Positive"), 
                                             levels = c("Negative", "Positive"))]
    
    # Handle missing values
    plot_data_long_otu <- plot_data_long_otu[, {
      n_valid <- sum(!is.na(Index_Value))
      if (n_valid == 0) {
        data.table(Index_Value = c(0.5 - 0.01, 0.5 + 0.01), 
                   Assoc_Type = factor(c("Negative", "Positive"), levels = c("Negative", "Positive")))
      } else if (n_valid == 1) {
        val <- Index_Value[!is.na(Index_Value)]
        assoc <- Assoc_Type[!is.na(Index_Value)]
        data.table(Index_Value = c(val, val - 0.01, val + 0.01), 
                   Assoc_Type = factor(c(assoc, "Negative", "Positive"), levels = c("Negative", "Positive")))
      } else {
        data.table(Index_Value = Index_Value, Assoc_Type = Assoc_Type)
      }
    }, by = .(parsed_genus, Index_Type)]
    
    # Calculate associations by OTU
    assoc_data_otu <- df[, .(Neg_Assoc = sum(estimate < 0, na.rm = TRUE), 
                            Pos_Assoc = sum(estimate > 0, na.rm = TRUE)), 
                        by = otu_clean]
    
    # Add TWO dummy association rows
    # Calculate max absolute association count for centering
    max_abs_count <- max(abs(c(assoc_data_otu$Neg_Assoc, assoc_data_otu$Pos_Assoc)), na.rm = TRUE)
    
    # Add TWO dummy association rows with symmetric values to force centering
    # Add TWO dummy association rows with symmetric values to force centering
    dummy_assoc <- data.table(
      otu_clean = c("DUMMY_OTU_1", "DUMMY_OTU_2"), 
      Neg_Assoc = c(max_abs_count + 15.5, 0), 
      Pos_Assoc = c(0, max_abs_count + 15.5)
    )
    assoc_data_otu <- rbind(assoc_data_otu, dummy_assoc)
    
    # Join with genus mapping
    assoc_data_otu <- merge(assoc_data_otu, mapping_data[, .(otu, parsed_genus)], 
                           by.x = "otu_clean", by.y = "otu", all.x = TRUE)
    assoc_data_otu[otu_clean %in% c("DUMMY_OTU_1", "DUMMY_OTU_2"), 
                   parsed_genus := c(DUMMY_LABEL, paste0(DUMMY_LABEL, "_2"))]
    
    # Remove duplicates and calculate totals
    assoc_data_otu <- assoc_data_otu[!duplicated(parsed_genus)]
    assoc_data_otu[, Total_Assoc := Neg_Assoc + Pos_Assoc]
    
    # Apply dummy positioning logic (same as Terry plots)
    assoc_counts <- assoc_data_otu[, .(parsed_genus, Total_Assoc)]
    
    # Separate dummies from real data
    dummy_rows_order <- assoc_counts[str_detect(parsed_genus, "DUMMY_PADDING_ROW_FOR_CONSISTENT_MARGINS")]
    real_rows_order <- assoc_counts[!str_detect(parsed_genus, "DUMMY_PADDING_ROW_FOR_CONSISTENT_MARGINS")][order(Total_Assoc, dplyr::desc(parsed_genus))]
    
    # Apply dummy positioning
    if (dummy_top_bottom == "top") {
      final_order <- c(dummy_rows_order$parsed_genus, real_rows_order$parsed_genus)
    } else if (dummy_top_bottom == "split") {
      dummy_1 <- dummy_rows_order$parsed_genus[1]
      dummy_2 <- dummy_rows_order$parsed_genus[2]
      final_order <- c(dummy_1, real_rows_order$parsed_genus, dummy_2)
    } else {
      final_order <- c(real_rows_order$parsed_genus, dummy_rows_order$parsed_genus)
    }
    
    # Transform association data to long format
    assoc_data_long_otu <- melt(assoc_data_otu, 
                               id.vars = "parsed_genus", 
                               measure.vars = c("Neg_Assoc", "Pos_Assoc"), 
                               variable.name = "Assoc_Type", 
                               value.name = "Count")
    assoc_data_long_otu[Assoc_Type == "Neg_Assoc", Count := -Count]
    assoc_data_long_otu[, Assoc_Type := factor(Assoc_Type, levels = c("Neg_Assoc", "Pos_Assoc"), 
                                              labels = c("Negative", "Positive"))]
    assoc_data_long_otu[, Index_Type := "Association Direction Count"]
    # Convert to character to avoid factor level conflicts during rbind
    assoc_data_long_otu[, Index_Type := as.character(Index_Type)]
    
    # Combine all data
    plot_data_combined <- rbind(
      plot_data_long_otu[, .(parsed_genus, Index_Type, Value = Index_Value, Assoc_Type)],
      assoc_data_long_otu[, .(parsed_genus, Index_Type, Value = Count, Assoc_Type)]
    )
    # Set factor levels AFTER rbind to ensure correct order
    if (hide_axis_title) {
      plot_data_combined[, Index_Type := factor(Index_Type, 
                                              levels = c("Association Direction Count", "STAIN_INDEX", "OXYGEN_INDEX", "MOTILITY_INDEX", "SPORULATION_INDEX"))]
    } else {
      plot_data_combined[, Index_Type := factor(Index_Type, 
                                              levels = c("Association Direction Count", "Gram Positivity (%)", "Oxygen Tolerance (%)", "Motility (%)", "Sporulating (%)"))]
    }    

    # Set Y-axis order consistently
    plot_data_combined[, parsed_genus := factor(parsed_genus, levels = final_order)]
    
    # Calculate number of rows for dimension calculation
    n_rows <- length(levels(plot_data_combined$parsed_genus))
    
    # Calculate mean values for points
    mean_data <- plot_data_combined[Index_Type != "Association Direction Count", 
                                   .(Mean_Value = mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE)), 
                                   by = .(parsed_genus, Index_Type, Assoc_Type)]
    
    # Calculate association breaks
    assoc_max <- ceiling(max(abs(assoc_data_long_otu$Count), na.rm = TRUE) / 5) * 5
    assoc_breaks <- seq(-assoc_max, assoc_max, by = 5)
    
    # Create the plot
    p <- ggplot(plot_data_combined, aes(x = Value, y = parsed_genus)) +
      geom_violin(data = plot_data_combined[Index_Type != "Association Direction Count"], 
                  aes(fill = Assoc_Type), alpha = 0.65, color = "black", linewidth = 0.1, na.rm = TRUE, 
                  width = 0.8, scale = "width", position = "identity") +
      geom_point(data = mean_data,  
           aes(x = Mean_Value, y = parsed_genus, color = Assoc_Type, fill = Assoc_Type),  
           shape = geom_point_shape, size = geom_point_size, alpha = 0.8, stroke = 0.1, na.rm = TRUE) +
      geom_bar(data = plot_data_combined[Index_Type == "Association Direction Count"], 
               aes(fill = Assoc_Type), stat = "identity", width = 0.8, alpha = 0.65) +
      geom_text(data = plot_data_combined[Index_Type == "Association Direction Count" & Value != 0], 
          aes(x = ifelse(Value < 0, Value - max(abs(Value)) * 0.02, Value + max(abs(Value)) * 0.02),
              y = parsed_genus,
              label = abs(Value)),
          size = 1.5, color = "#555555", hjust = ifelse(plot_data_combined[Index_Type == "Association Direction Count" & Value != 0]$Value < 0, 1, 0)) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = association_colors, na.translate = FALSE) +
      scale_color_manual(values = association_colors, na.translate = FALSE) +
      geom_vline(aes(xintercept = ifelse(Index_Type == "Association Direction Count", 0, 0.5)), 
                 linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
      geom_blank(data = data.frame(
        Index_Type = if(hide_axis_title) {
          factor(c("STAIN_INDEX", "OXYGEN_INDEX", "MOTILITY_INDEX", "SPORULATION_INDEX"), 
                 levels = c("STAIN_INDEX", "OXYGEN_INDEX", "MOTILITY_INDEX", "SPORULATION_INDEX"))
        } else {
          factor(c("Gram Positivity (%)", "Oxygen Tolerance (%)", "Motility (%)", "Sporulating (%)"), 
                 levels = c("Gram Positivity (%)", "Oxygen Tolerance (%)", "Motility (%)", "Sporulating (%)"))
        },
        Value = rep(c(0, 1), 2),
        y_var = rep(levels(plot_data_combined[[if(plot_type == "host") "var_description" else "parsed_genus"]])[1], 8)
      ), aes(x = Value, y = y_var), inherit.aes = FALSE) +
      
      facet_wrap(~ Index_Type, nrow = 1, scales = "free_x") +

      scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = function(x) {
          if (length(x) == 0) return(NULL)  # Handle empty data
          if (max(x, na.rm = TRUE) <= 1) {
            c(0, 0.5, 1)
          } else {
            assoc_breaks
          }
        }, 
        labels = function(x) {
          if (length(x) == 0) return(NULL)  # Handle empty data
          x
        }
      ) +
      coord_cartesian(xlim = c(NA, NA)) +  # Let ggplot handle limits naturally
      scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
      
      # Apply Terry plot theme standards
      egg::theme_article(base_size = 6, base_family = "ArialMT") +
      theme(
        # Add horizontal grid lines
        panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.1, linetype = "solid"),
        panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
        
        axis.text.y = element_text(
          size = 6,                                              
          margin = margin(r = TEXT_MARGIN_PT, unit = "pt"),      
          hjust = 1,                                             
          lineheight = 0.9                                       
        ),
        axis.text.x = element_text(
          size = 6,                                              
          margin = margin(t = TEXT_MARGIN_PT, unit = "pt")       
        ),
        axis.ticks.y = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "black"),
        axis.ticks.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.2, color = "black"),
        axis.ticks.length = unit(1, "pt"),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black", linewidth = 0.3),
        plot.margin = margin(t = 2, r = 2, b = 2, l = 2, unit = "pt"),
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_blank(),
        legend.position = if(show_legend) "bottom" else "none",
        legend.box = if(show_legend) "horizontal" else NULL,
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
        strip.text = if(hide_axis_title) element_blank() else element_text(size = 6, angle = 90, hjust = 0)
      )
    
    # Set file suffix
    file_suffix <- "_otu_indices.pdf"
  }
  
  # Calculate EXACT plot dimensions using Terry plot logic
  dims <- calc_exact_plot_dimensions(n_rows, width_mm, calibrate_y_mm)
  
  # Print dimension information for verification
  cat("Creating:", file_prefix, "\n")
  cat("  Plot type:", plot_type, "\n")
  # cat("  Rows:", n_rows, "@ exactly", ROW_HEIGHT_PT, "pt each\n")
  if (!is.null(prefix_subsets)) {
    cat("  Filtered by prefixes:", paste(prefix_subsets, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  }
  if (remove_na_unclassified) {
    cat("  Removed unclassified microbes\n")
  }
  # cat("  Dummy positioning:", dummy_top_bottom, "\n")
  # cat("  Show legend:", show_legend, "\n")
  # cat("  Plot height:", round(dims$plot_height_pt, 1), "pt =", round(dims$height_mm - dims$calibration_mm - 10, 1), "mm\n")
  # if (calibrate_y_mm != 0) {
  #   cat("  Manual calibration:", calibrate_y_mm, "mm", if(calibrate_y_mm > 0) "(expanded)" else "(compressed)", "\n")
  # }
  # cat("  Total PDF:", dims$width_mm, "×", round(dims$height_mm, 1), "mm\n")
  # Save using Terry plot method
  file_name <- paste0(file_prefix, file_suffix)
  save_pdf_figure(file_name, plot_obj = p, 
                  width_mm = dims$width_mm, height_mm = dims$height_mm)
  
  return(p)
}

```

```{R save-Terry-Plot-None-Transformation}
plot_configs <- list(
  # OTU plots - show microbial genera (Y-axis) vs host variable types (colors), no annotations for clarity
  # HOST plots - show host variables (Y-axis) vs microbial phylums (colors), with genus annotations
  
  # FIGURE 1 ----
  list(df = datasets$demowas_none, plot_type = "host", file_prefix = "figS1_host_demographics_full",
       width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 18.5, remove_na = TRUE, remove_na_unclassified = FALSE, 
       min_annotations = 5, add_annotations = TRUE, show_legend = TRUE, dummy_top_bottom = "split"),

       prefix_subsets = glucose_insulin_markers, width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 10.4, remove_na = TRUE,

       prefix_subsets = blood_endocrine_vars, width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 13.7, remove_na = TRUE,

       prefix_subsets = blood_onecarbon_folate_vars, width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 13.7, remove_na = TRUE,

       dummy_top_bottom = "split"),
  
  list(df = datasets$phewas_none, plot_type = "host", file_prefix = "fig5.4b_phenome_Immune_urine_kidney_iodine_vars", 
       prefix_subsets = urine_kidney_iodine_vars, width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 8.15, remove_na = TRUE, 
       remove_na_unclassified = FALSE, min_annotations = 5, add_annotations = TRUE, show_legend = TRUE, 
       dummy_top_bottom = "split"),
  
  list(df = datasets$phewas_none, plot_type = "host", file_prefix = "fig5.4a_phenome_Immune_airway_inflammation_var", 
       prefix_subsets = airway_inflammation_var, width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 8.15, remove_na = TRUE, 
       remove_na_unclassified = FALSE, min_annotations = 5, add_annotations = TRUE, show_legend = TRUE, 
       dummy_top_bottom = "split"),

  list(df = datasets$phewas_none, plot_type = "host", file_prefix = "fig5.3b_phenome_physiology_anthropometry_blood_pressure", 
       prefix_subsets = c("BMX", "BPX", "MDI", "MSY"), width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 17.7, remove_na = TRUE, 
       remove_na_unclassified = FALSE, min_annotations = 5, add_annotations = TRUE, show_legend = TRUE, 
       dummy_top_bottom = "split"),

  list(df = datasets$phewas_none, plot_type = "otu", file_prefix = "figS5_otu_phenome_full",
       width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 130, remove_na = TRUE, remove_na_unclassified = FALSE, 
       add_annotations = FALSE, show_legend = TRUE, dummy_top_bottom = "split"),

  # FIGURE 6 ----
  list(df = datasets$outwas_none, plot_type = "host", file_prefix = "figS6_host_outcomes_full",
       width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 19.5, remove_na = TRUE, remove_na_unclassified = FALSE, 
       min_annotations = 5, add_annotations = TRUE, show_legend = TRUE, dummy_top_bottom = "split"),
  
  list(df = datasets$outwas_none, plot_type = "host", file_prefix = "fig6.1c_outcomes_cancer", 
       prefix_subsets = c("CAN"), width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 7.35, remove_na = TRUE, 
       remove_na_unclassified = TRUE, min_annotations = 5, add_annotations = TRUE, show_legend = TRUE, 
       dummy_top_bottom = "split"),
  
  list(df = datasets$outwas_none, plot_type = "host", file_prefix = "fig6.1a_outcomes_cardiovascular", 
       prefix_subsets = c("CHD", "HEA", "ANG", "STR", "CVD"), width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 14.1, 
       remove_na = TRUE, remove_na_unclassified = FALSE, min_annotations = 5, add_annotations = TRUE, 
       show_legend = TRUE, dummy_top_bottom = "split"),
  
  list(df = datasets$outwas_none, plot_type = "host", file_prefix = "fig6.1b_outcomes_respiratory", 
       prefix_subsets = c("EMP", "AST", "BRO"), width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 8.15, remove_na = TRUE, 
       remove_na_unclassified = FALSE, min_annotations = 5, add_annotations = TRUE, show_legend = TRUE, 
       dummy_top_bottom = "split"),
  
  list(df = datasets$outwas_none, plot_type = "host", file_prefix = "fig6.1d_outcomes_diabetes", 
       prefix_subsets = c("DIA"), width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 6.35, remove_na = TRUE, 
       remove_na_unclassified = FALSE, min_annotations = 5, add_annotations = TRUE, show_legend = TRUE, 
       dummy_top_bottom = "split"),

  list(df = datasets$outwas_none, plot_type = "otu", file_prefix = "figS6_otu_outcomes_full",
       width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 85, remove_na = TRUE, remove_na_unclassified = FALSE, 
       add_annotations = FALSE, show_legend = TRUE, color_by_variable = FALSE)
)

# Generate all plots using the exact same row spacing with optional manual calibration
output_dir <- "none"  # Add this line
success_count <- 0
for (i in seq_along(plot_configs)) {
  config <- plot_configs[[i]]
  
  cat("Plot", i, "of", length(plot_configs), ":\n")
  
  # Call the plotting function with consistent parameters + manual calibration
  result <- plot_and_save(
    df = config$df,
    plot_type = config$plot_type,
    file_prefix = file.path(output_dir, config$file_prefix),     # Modify this line
    width_mm = config$width_mm,                                  # Plot width in mm
    calibrate_y_mm = config$calibrate_y_mm %||% 0,               # Manual height calibration
    genus_mapping = genus_mapping,                               # OTU to genus mapping
    ubiome_variable_mapping = ubiome_variable_mapping,           # Host variable descriptions
    phylum_df = phylum_info,                                     # OTU to phylum mapping
    phylum_colors = phylum_colors,                               # Phylum color palette
    split_by_prefix = config$split_by_prefix %||% FALSE,         # Whether to facet by host variable prefix
    prefix_subsets = config$prefix_subsets,                      # Filter to specific prefixes
    remove_na = config$remove_na %||% FALSE,                     # Remove NA entries
    remove_na_unclassified = config$remove_na_unclassified %||% FALSE,  # Remove unclassified microbes
    annotate_na = config$annotate_na %||% FALSE,                 # Include NA in annotations
    xlim = config$xlim,                                          # Custom x-axis limits
    min_annotations = config$min_annotations %||% 3,             # Number of annotations per row
    add_annotations = config$add_annotations %||% TRUE,          # Whether to add annotations
    show_legend = config$show_legend %||% FALSE,                 # Legend display
    color_by_variable = config$color_by_variable %||% FALSE,     # Color by full variable names
    dummy_top_bottom = config$dummy_top_bottom %||% "bottom"     # Dummy row placement
  )
  
  # Track successful plots
  if (!is.null(result)) {
    success_count <- success_count + 1
    # cat("  ✓ SUCCESS\n\n")
  } else {
    # cat("  ✗ FAILED (no data)\n\n")
  }
}

cat("Generated", success_count, "of", length(plot_configs), "plots successfully.\n")
```

```{R save-Terry-Plot-Hellinger-Transformation}
plot_configs <- list(
  # OTU plots - show microbial genera (Y-axis) vs host variable types (colors), no annotations for clarity

       prefix_subsets = glucose_insulin_markers, width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 10.4, remove_na = TRUE,

       prefix_subsets = c("CHD", "HEA", "ANG", "STR", "CVD"), width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 11.3, 
       remove_na = TRUE, remove_na_unclassified = FALSE, min_annotations = 5, add_annotations = TRUE, 
       show_legend = TRUE, dummy_top_bottom = "split"),
  
  list(df = datasets$outwas_hellinger, plot_type = "host", file_prefix = "fig6.1b_outcomes_respiratory", 
       prefix_subsets = c("EMP", "AST", "BRO"), width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 8.15, remove_na = TRUE, 
       remove_na_unclassified = FALSE, min_annotations = 5, add_annotations = TRUE, show_legend = TRUE, 
       dummy_top_bottom = "split"),
  
  list(df = datasets$outwas_hellinger, plot_type = "host", file_prefix = "fig6.1d_outcomes_diabetes", 
       prefix_subsets = c("DIA"), width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 6.35, remove_na = TRUE, 
       remove_na_unclassified = FALSE, min_annotations = 5, add_annotations = TRUE, show_legend = TRUE, 
       dummy_top_bottom = "split"),

  list(df = datasets$outwas_hellinger, plot_type = "otu", file_prefix = "figS6_otu_outcomes_full",
       width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 85, remove_na = TRUE, remove_na_unclassified = FALSE, 
       add_annotations = FALSE, show_legend = TRUE, color_by_variable = FALSE)
)

# Generate all plots using the exact same row spacing with optional manual calibration
output_dir <- "hellinger"  # Add this line
success_count <- 0
for (i in seq_along(plot_configs)) {
  config <- plot_configs[[i]]
  
  cat("Plot", i, "of", length(plot_configs), ":\n")
  
  # Call the plotting function with consistent parameters + manual calibration
  result <- plot_and_save(
    df = config$df,
    plot_type = config$plot_type,
    file_prefix = file.path(output_dir, config$file_prefix),     # Modify this line
    width_mm = config$width_mm,                                  # Plot width in mm
    calibrate_y_mm = config$calibrate_y_mm %||% 0,               # Manual height calibration
    genus_mapping = genus_mapping,                               # OTU to genus mapping
    ubiome_variable_mapping = ubiome_variable_mapping,           # Host variable descriptions
    phylum_df = phylum_info,                                     # OTU to phylum mapping
    phylum_colors = phylum_colors,                               # Phylum color palette
    split_by_prefix = config$split_by_prefix %||% FALSE,         # Whether to facet by host variable prefix
    prefix_subsets = config$prefix_subsets,                      # Filter to specific prefixes
    remove_na = config$remove_na %||% FALSE,                     # Remove NA entries
    remove_na_unclassified = config$remove_na_unclassified %||% FALSE,  # Remove unclassified microbes
    annotate_na = config$annotate_na %||% FALSE,                 # Include NA in annotations
    xlim = config$xlim,                                          # Custom x-axis limits
    min_annotations = config$min_annotations %||% 3,             # Number of annotations per row
    add_annotations = config$add_annotations %||% TRUE,          # Whether to add annotations
    show_legend = config$show_legend %||% FALSE,                 # Legend display
    color_by_variable = config$color_by_variable %||% FALSE,     # Color by full variable names
    dummy_top_bottom = config$dummy_top_bottom %||% "split"     # Dummy row placement
  )
  
  # Track successful plots
  if (!is.null(result)) {
    success_count <- success_count + 1
    # cat("  ✓ SUCCESS\n\n")
  } else {
    # cat("  ✗ FAILED (no data)\n\n")
  }
}

cat("Generated", success_count, "of", length(plot_configs), "plots successfully.\n")
```

```{R save-Terry-Plot-CLR Transformation}
plot_configs <- list(
  # OTU plots - show microbial genera (Y-axis) vs host variable types (colors), no annotations for clarity
  # HOST plots - show host variables (Y-axis) vs microbial phylums (colors), with genus annotations

  list(df = datasets$demowas_clr, plot_type = "host", file_prefix = "figS1_host_demographics_full",

  list(df = datasets$exwas_clr, plot_type = "host", file_prefix = "fig4.1f_exposome_blood_halogenated_aromatic", 
       prefix_subsets = halogenated_aromatic, width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 8.15+3.4, remove_na = TRUE, 
       remove_na_unclassified = FALSE, min_annotations = 5, add_annotations = TRUE, show_legend = TRUE, 
       dummy_top_bottom = "split"),

  list(df = datasets$exwas_clr, plot_type = "host", file_prefix = "fig4.1c_exposome_blood_aromatic_hydrocarbons",  
       prefix_subsets = aromatic_hydrocarbons, width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 7.35+3.1, remove_na = TRUE, 
       remove_na_unclassified = FALSE, min_annotations = 5, add_annotations = TRUE, show_legend = TRUE, 
       dummy_top_bottom = "split"),

  list(df = datasets$exwas_clr, plot_type = "host", file_prefix = "fig4.1_exposome_blood_nitro_aromatic_voc",
       prefix_subsets = nitro_aromatic_voc, width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 8, remove_na = TRUE,

       width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 106, remove_na = TRUE, remove_na_unclassified = FALSE, 
       add_annotations = FALSE, show_legend = TRUE, color_by_variable = FALSE),

  # FIGURE 5 ----
  list(df = datasets$phewas_clr, plot_type = "host", file_prefix = "fig5_host_phenome_full",
       width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 25, remove_na = TRUE, remove_na_unclassified = FALSE,

       prefix_subsets = rbc_morphology_indices, width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 7.35, remove_na = TRUE,

       dummy_top_bottom = "split"),
  
  list(df = datasets$phewas_clr, plot_type = "host", file_prefix = "fig5.1f_host_phenome_hematology_blood_platelet_count", 
       prefix_subsets = platelet_count, width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 26.35, remove_na = TRUE,

       min_annotations = 5, add_annotations = TRUE, show_legend = TRUE, dummy_top_bottom = "split"),

       remove_na_unclassified = TRUE, min_annotations = 5, add_annotations = TRUE, show_legend = TRUE,

       prefix_subsets = c("CHD", "HEA", "ANG", "STR", "CVD"), width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 11, 
       remove_na = TRUE, remove_na_unclassified = FALSE, min_annotations = 5, add_annotations = TRUE, 
       show_legend = TRUE, dummy_top_bottom = "split"),
  
  list(df = datasets$outwas_clr, plot_type = "host", file_prefix = "fig6.1b_outcomes_respiratory", 
       prefix_subsets = c("EMP", "AST", "BRO"), width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 8.15, remove_na = TRUE, 
       remove_na_unclassified = FALSE, min_annotations = 5, add_annotations = TRUE, show_legend = TRUE, 
       dummy_top_bottom = "split"),
  
  list(df = datasets$outwas_clr, plot_type = "host", file_prefix = "fig6.1d_outcomes_diabetes", 
       prefix_subsets = c("DIA"), width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 6.35, remove_na = TRUE, 
       remove_na_unclassified = FALSE, min_annotations = 5, add_annotations = TRUE, show_legend = TRUE, 
       dummy_top_bottom = "split"),

  list(df = datasets$outwas_clr, plot_type = "otu", file_prefix = "figS6_otu_outcomes_full",
       width_mm = 165, calibrate_y_mm = 85, remove_na = TRUE, remove_na_unclassified = FALSE, 
       add_annotations = FALSE, show_legend = TRUE, color_by_variable = FALSE)
)

# Generate all plots using the exact same row spacing with optional manual calibration
output_dir <- "clr"  # Add this line
success_count <- 0
for (i in seq_along(plot_configs)) {
  config <- plot_configs[[i]]
  
  cat("Plot", i, "of", length(plot_configs), ":\n")
  
  # Call the plotting function with consistent parameters + manual calibration
  result <- plot_and_save(
    df = config$df,
    plot_type = config$plot_type,
    file_prefix = file.path(output_dir, config$file_prefix),     # Modify this line
    width_mm = config$width_mm,                                  # Plot width in mm
    calibrate_y_mm = config$calibrate_y_mm %||% 0,               # Manual height calibration
    genus_mapping = genus_mapping,                               # OTU to genus mapping
    ubiome_variable_mapping = ubiome_variable_mapping,           # Host variable descriptions
    phylum_df = phylum_info,                                     # OTU to phylum mapping
    phylum_colors = phylum_colors,                               # Phylum color palette
    split_by_prefix = config$split_by_prefix %||% FALSE,         # Whether to facet by host variable prefix
    prefix_subsets = config$prefix_subsets,                      # Filter to specific prefixes
    remove_na = config$remove_na %||% FALSE,                     # Remove NA entries
    remove_na_unclassified = config$remove_na_unclassified %||% FALSE,  # Remove unclassified microbes
    annotate_na = config$annotate_na %||% FALSE,                 # Include NA in annotations
    xlim = config$xlim,                                          # Custom x-axis limits
    min_annotations = config$min_annotations %||% 3,             # Number of annotations per row
    add_annotations = config$add_annotations %||% TRUE,          # Whether to add annotations
    show_legend = config$show_legend %||% FALSE,                 # Legend display
    color_by_variable = config$color_by_variable %||% FALSE,     # Color by full variable names
    dummy_top_bottom = config$dummy_top_bottom %||% "split"     # Dummy row placement
  )
  
  # Track successful plots
  if (!is.null(result)) {
    success_count <- success_count + 1
    # cat("  ✓ SUCCESS\n\n")
  } else {
    # cat("  ✗ FAILED (no data)\n\n")
  }
}

cat("Generated", success_count, "of", length(plot_configs), "plots successfully.\n")
```

```{R save-Indicies-Plot-None-Transformation}
library(dplyr)
##################################################
# INDICES PLOT CONFIGURATIONS
##################################################
indices_plot_configs <- list(
  # OTU plots - show microbial genera (Y-axis) vs host variable types (colors), no annotations for clarity
  # HOST plots - show host variables (Y-axis) vs microbial phylums (colors), with genus annotations
  # FIGURE 1 ----
  list(df = datasets$demowas_none, plot_type = "host", file_prefix = "figS1_host_demographics_full",
       width_mm = 140, calibrate_y_mm = 18, remove_na = TRUE, remove_na_unclassified = FALSE, 
       show_legend = TRUE, dummy_top_bottom = "top", hide_axis_title = TRUE, geom_point_shape = 21, geom_point_size = 1.8),
  
  list(df = datasets$demowas_none, plot_type = "host", file_prefix = "fig1.1b_demographics_poverty_edu", 
       prefix_subsets = c("IND","EDU"), width_mm = 140, calibrate_y_mm = 8.2, remove_na = TRUE, 
       remove_na_unclassified = FALSE, show_legend = TRUE, dummy_top_bottom = "top", 
       hide_axis_title = TRUE, geom_point_shape = 21, geom_point_size = 1.8),
  
  list(df = datasets$demowas_none, plot_type = "host", file_prefix = "fig1.1a_demographics_poverty_edu", 
       prefix_subsets = c("RIA","ETH","BOR"), width_mm = 140, calibrate_y_mm = 9.5, remove_na = TRUE, 
       remove_na_unclassified = FALSE, show_legend = TRUE, dummy_top_bottom = "top", 
       hide_axis_title = TRUE, geom_point_shape = 21, geom_point_size = 1.8),
  
  list(df = datasets$demowas_none, plot_type = "host", file_prefix = "fig1.1c_demographics_age", 
       prefix_subsets = c("RID","AGE"), width_mm = 140, calibrate_y_mm = 5.35, remove_na = TRUE, 
       remove_na_unclassified = FALSE, show_legend = TRUE, dummy_top_bottom = "top",

       hide_axis_title = TRUE, geom_point_shape = 21, geom_point_size = 1.8),

  list(df = datasets$exwas_none, plot_type = "host", file_prefix = "fig4.1_exposome_blood_tb_igra",
```
